mapper.select: SELECT * FROM specialty WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM specialty s LEFT JOIN specialty_category c ON s.category_id = c.id ORDER BY s.id ASC
SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM specialty s LEFT JOIN specialty_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO specialty (id, category_id, name, description, price, stock, main_image, images, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE specialty SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
UPDATE specialty SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM specialty_category ORDER BY sort_order
